q: What is the distribution of issue resolution times in SMP by priority?

q: Compare the number of subtasks to parent issues in SMP

q: What is the trend of issue creation in SMP project over the past 6 months?

q: How has the number of resolved issues in SMP changed quarter over quarter?

q: Find all bugs in SMP project, group them by priority, and tell me which priority level has the most issues
jql: project = SMP AND type = Bug

q: Get all high priority issues in SMP that are not done, then calculate what percentage of total SMP issues they represent
jql: project = SMP AND priority = High AND status != Done

q: List all issues in SMP project created more than 90 days ago that are still open, and rank them by how long they've been open
jql: project = SMP AND created <= -90d AND status != Done

q: Find all tasks in SMP, identify which ones have been updated in the last 60 days, and summarize the activity pattern
jql: project = SMP AND type = Task AND updated >= -60d

q: Get all SMP issues with status 'In Progress', group by assignee, and identify who has the highest workload
jql: project = SMP AND status = 'In Progress'

q: Search for all SMP issues that are unassigned and have high or highest priority, then recommend which should be addressed first based on age
jql: project = SMP AND assignee is EMPTY AND priority in (High, Highest)

q: Find all SMP issues created in the last 180 days, analyze the distribution by issue type, and identify trends
jql: project = SMP AND created >= -180d

q: Get all completed issues in SMP from the last year, calculate the average time to resolution, and identify outliers
jql: project = SMP AND status = Done AND resolved >= -365d

q: List all SMP issues with no description, group them by issue type, and provide recommendations for improving documentation
jql: project = SMP AND description is EMPTY

q: Find all SMP bugs that were resolved but later reopened, and analyze the common characteristics
jql: project = SMP AND type = Bug AND status changed FROM Done

q: Search SMP for issues with the lowest priority that have been open for more than 30 days, and suggest which could be closed as won't fix
jql: project = SMP AND priority = Lowest AND created <= -30d AND status != Done

q: Get all SMP issues updated today, identify what changed, and summarize the day's activity
jql: project = SMP AND updated >= startOfDay()

q: Find all SMP stories, check which ones have subtasks, and calculate the percentage with versus without subtasks
jql: project = SMP AND type = Story

q: List SMP issues by status, calculate the count in each status, and identify potential bottlenecks in the workflow
jql: project = SMP

q: Get all SMP issues created this month, compare to last month's creation rate, and analyze if the trend is increasing or decreasing
jql: project = SMP AND created >= startOfMonth()

q: Find all critical and blocker issues in SMP that are not resolved, list the assignees, and calculate average age per assignee
jql: project = SMP AND priority in (Critical, Blocker) AND resolution is EMPTY

q: Search for SMP issues that have been in 'To Do' status for more than 60 days and rank them by priority to suggest which to tackle first
jql: project = SMP AND status = 'To Do' AND created <= -60d

q: Get the first 100 SMP issues, analyze their type distribution, and compare with the overall project composition
jql: project = SMP ORDER BY created ASC

q: Find all SMP epics, list how many issues are linked to each, and identify epics that might need more breakdown
jql: project = SMP AND type = Epic

q: List all SMP issues with attachments, group by issue type, and summarize what kinds of attachments are most common
jql: project = SMP AND attachments is not EMPTY

q: Get all SMP bugs resolved in the last 90 days, calculate average resolution time, and identify the fastest and slowest resolved bugs
jql: project = SMP AND type = Bug AND resolved >= -90d

q: Find all SMP issues with comments added in the last 7 days, group by reporter, and identify most actively discussed issues
jql: project = SMP AND updated >= -7d

q: Search SMP for all issues assigned to a specific user, calculate their completion rate, and compare to project average
jql: project = SMP AND assignee is not EMPTY

q: Get all SMP issues created this year, identify the busiest month for issue creation, and analyze what types were created most
jql: project = SMP AND created >= startOfYear()

q: Find all SMP tasks that are overdue (past due date), rank by how overdue they are, and suggest prioritization
jql: project = SMP AND type = Task AND due < now() AND status != Done

q: List all SMP issues with the same summary text (potential duplicates), group them, and recommend which to merge
jql: project = SMP

q: Get all SMP issues that have been updated but not resolved in the last 30 days, analyze update frequency, and identify stalled items
jql: project = SMP AND updated >= -30d AND resolution is EMPTY

q: Find the 50 oldest open issues in SMP, categorize by type and priority, and create a cleanup recommendation
jql: project = SMP AND status != Done ORDER BY created ASC

q: Search SMP for issues that changed status in the last 14 days, track the flow between statuses, and visualize the workflow
jql: project = SMP AND status changed AFTER -14d

q: Get all SMP issues with due dates set, calculate how many are overdue vs on track vs completed on time
jql: project = SMP AND due is not EMPTY

q: Find all SMP issues created by each reporter, rank reporters by issue count, and identify the top 5 contributors
jql: project = SMP

q: List all Done issues in SMP from the last quarter, analyze resolution distribution by month, and identify trends
jql: project = SMP AND status = Done AND resolved >= -90d

q: Get all SMP medium priority issues, compare their average age to high priority issues, and analyze if prioritization is effective
jql: project = SMP AND priority = Medium

q: Find all SMP issues that have no assignee and no due date, group by type, and recommend assignment priorities
jql: project = SMP AND assignee is EMPTY AND due is EMPTY

q: Search SMP for issues linked to other issues, analyze the link types used, and identify issues with the most connections
jql: project = SMP AND issueLink is not EMPTY

q: Get all SMP issues, calculate the ratio of bugs to features, and compare this to industry standards
jql: project = SMP

q: Find all SMP issues in progress for more than 30 days, identify blockers, and suggest actions to unblock them
jql: project = SMP AND status = 'In Progress' AND updated <= -30d

q: List all SMP issues with watchers, group by issue priority, and analyze which priority levels get the most attention
jql: project = SMP AND watchers is not EMPTY

q: Get all SMP subtasks, identify their parent issues, and calculate which parents have the most incomplete subtasks
jql: project = SMP AND type = Sub-task AND status != Done

q: Find SMP issues where the reporter and assignee are the same person, analyze how common this is, and if resolution times differ
jql: project = SMP AND reporter = assignee

q: Search all SMP issues, identify which ones have been reopened multiple times, and analyze the root causes
jql: project = SMP AND status changed FROM Done TO 'In Progress'

q: Get all SMP high priority bugs created this year, track their resolution timeline, and calculate average time in each status
jql: project = SMP AND type = Bug AND priority = High AND created >= startOfYear()

q: Find all SMP issues without any comments, group by age, and recommend which need immediate attention
jql: project = SMP AND comments = 0

q: List all resolved SMP issues, calculate resolution rate by week for the last 8 weeks, and identify velocity trends
jql: project = SMP AND resolved >= -56d

q: Get SMP issues with estimates set, compare estimated vs actual time for completed issues, and calculate accuracy
jql: project = SMP AND originalEstimate is not EMPTY AND status = Done

q: Find all SMP issues that were created and resolved on the same day, analyze their characteristics, and identify quick-win patterns
jql: project = SMP AND created >= -365d AND resolved is not EMPTY

q: Search SMP for issues updated this week but created more than 6 months ago, analyze why they're still active, and recommend actions
jql: project = SMP AND updated >= startOfWeek() AND created <= -180d
